name: Chewiest Granola Bars
recipeInstructions: Preheat the oven to 350°F. Coat the inside of a glass 9x12 baking dish with light vegetable oil. In a large bowl, combine the sugar, corn syrup, vegetable margarine, peanut butter and vanilla extract, stirring until well mixed and the consistency is that of a paste. Add the remaining ingredients and mix thoroughly so that several large clumps form. Using your fingers, press the mixture into the baking dish. Bake at 350°F for 15-20 minutes until golden brown. Allow to cool completely before cutting into bars.
